title: abies fabri subsp. fordei
intro: Abies fabri subsp. fordei, also known as Formosa fir or Taiwan fir, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree native to Taiwan. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and exerting antimicrobial properties. Abies fabri subsp. fordei can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, essential oil, and resin, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
